text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Bravo. That rescue went rather well, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My magnificent beauty shined clearly through the
glass, giving you the extra boost you required!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh! No need to thank me! My loveliness exists to
save the whole world, after all!
